sourceVideo.purpose: AI Studio video reference for shot cadence, camera language, and cut timing

iclone.blocking: Place the right1 proxy beside the car, head lowered at the start, then lift gaze toward camera. Keep the bat hidden.
iclone.camera: Medium close framing, subject on the right half of frame, car edge on the left, subtle arc move and slight push-in.
iclone.focus: Start on torso and settle on the face.

seedance.instruction: Preserve the right1 face, curly brunette updo, black velvet gown and rose-gold drape. Use the iClone camera composition and motion.

iclone.blocking: Place left2 in the foreground. Rotate the head toward camera and hold a controlled, distant expression.
iclone.camera: Rapid cut to a glasses close-up, then a controlled push-in to an extreme close-up.
iclone.focus: Rack focus to the eyes behind the glasses; background fully soft.

seedance.instruction: Preserve the gold glasses, blonde updo, ivory dress, and pearl accessories. The final focus must stay on the eyes.

iclone.blocking: Reveal a metallic bat on right1 shoulder. Keep one hand visibly gripping the handle and settle into a confident shoulder pose.
iclone.camera: Fast transition from the prior close-up into a foreground medium close shot. Keep face, shoulders, and bat readable together.
iclone.focus: Face is sharp; bat and car remain legible with shallow depth of field.

seedance.instruction: Preserve right1 identity and wardrobe. Metallic bat rests naturally across the shoulder without changing shape or leaving the hand.

iclone.blocking: Place center_navy in front of the luxury car with one relaxed leg and a poised, commanding stance.
iclone.camera: Low-to-level reveal, then settle into a medium portrait with the car clearly behind the role.
iclone.focus: Settle on the center role face after the reveal.

seedance.instruction: Preserve blonde updo, navy off-shoulder gown, pearl necklace, and the poised center-role silhouette.

iclone.blocking: Arrange left2, left1, center_navy, right1, right2 from left to right. Put right1 just left of center with the bat, center_navy in front of the car.
iclone.camera: Centered symmetrical wide shot. All five bodies and the car must remain inside the frame.
iclone.focus: Moderate depth of field so all five roles remain readable.

seedance.instruction: Preserve five distinct identities, gowns, hairstyles, jewelry, and final left-to-right placement. No role merging or duplicated faces.
